skill.description: Name of the installed skill that drives the swarm (e.g. "couch-potato")

mode_switch_offered.description: Set to true by the update skill when a mode switch is offered to the user. Optional.

project_slug.description: Globally-unique prefix used to namespace team names in ~/.claude/teams/ so that teams from different projects never collide. Team names are formed as <project_slug>-<req-id> (e.g. "couch-potato-req-017"). Optional — if absent at runtime, Team Lead derives the value from the basename of PROJECT_ROOT and writes it back to config.json so the slug stabilises for all future runs.

stack.description: Detected stack label (e.g. "Node.js + Next.js"). Persisted from the init-skill adaptation plan so agents can read project context without re-scanning. Optional — omit for projects where stack detection was skipped.

server_ports.description: Named port assignments for the project's servers. Optional — omit for projects with no dev server (CLIs, libraries, batch scripts).

project_path.description: Path to the project root, relative to the repository root (use "." for monorepo root)

frontend_path.description: Path to the frontend app, relative to the repository root (e.g. "apps/frontend"). Optional — omit for backend-only projects (Go CLIs, Rust libraries, Python ML pipelines, etc.) that have no frontend.

check_command.description: Command Coders run after each change to type-check the project (e.g. "pnpm type-check"). Optional — omit if the project has no compile/type-check step.

lint_command.description: Command Coders run after each change to lint and auto-fix (e.g. "pnpm lint:fix"). Optional — omit if the project has no lint step.

build_command.description: Command to build the project for production (e.g. "pnpm build"). Optional — omit if the project has no build step.

dev_command.description: Command to start the development server (e.g. "pnpm dev"). Optional — omit if the project has no dev server.

enable_fast_track.description: Allow Team Lead to bypass Architect planning for simple, well-scoped tasks

review_prompt_required.description: Team Lead must ask the user about code review before proceeding to shutdown

model_resolution_priority.description: Ordered list of strategies for resolving which model to use for an agent

default_requires_verification_by_type.description: Whether Tester verification is required by default for each task type
